titleStmt.title: SII 40.179: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 179. (A.R. No. B. 314 of 1931.) Satrasāla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab built into a wall of the Śiva temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1166, Krōdhi, Kārttīka, śu. 15, Monday, corresponding to 1244 A.D., October 17.

Incomplete. Mentions the praśasti of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gaṇḍapeṇḍāra Ambayyadēva, the subordinate of Gaṇapatidēva. Records the gift of an oil-mill and some taxes (suṅka) levied at Sattrasāla by Aṁbayyadēva for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Svayaṁbhu Śrī Mahādēva in the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti Anēka nāmāvaḷī virājamāna mānōnnata Ativiṣa
ma hayārūḍha prauḍharēkhārēvaṁtta parabaḷakritāṁtta nēkāṁ
gavīra vīrāvatāra dāmōdarasainya diśāpaṭṭa maṁḍalika brahmarā
kṣasa nāyaka nārāyaṇa gaṇapatidēva divya śrīpāda padmārādhakaparī
baḷu sādhaka nāmādhi samasta praśasti sahita śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
gaṁḍḍapeṁḍḍāru Aṁbayyadēvaṁḍu svasti sakavarṣaṁbulu 1166 gunē
ṁṭi krōdhi saṁvatsara kārttika śu 15 sōmavāramu nāṁḍu satrasāla sva
yaṁbhu śrīmahādēvaraku dīpamunaku sarvvamānyamugāṁgānuvu nilpi
satra sāla lōpali Aśēṣamaina suṁkamu dēvaraku Ācaṁdratārārkamu The inscription stops abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 40.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
